Okay, what is G Suite for Business? Okay, it's a company owned email domain. All right, and so this will do, which is a huge protector for you as a business owner. Is it will give you control over all of someone's email, Google Drive, all the documents your team owns, creates, as well as, if you have software that they're using, right, say, logins that are with Gym Launch, logins that are with Skipio, Twilio, whatever it may be, if they're under your teammate's email, which is owned by, you know, Body Forge Fitness, then when they leave, you own all of those logins, you don't have to worry about changing passwords, none of that, okay? So this protects you a ton, and it is so easy to set up. Okay, so I wanted to put this video in before you're how to set up G Suite, because I just want you to understand, like, this protects you so much, and I know too many Gym owners who have not protected themselves, and then gotten screwed, because unfortunately, some people, like, you just gotta always anticipate that some people don't have your best interests at heart, okay, so they might try to hack your stuff, they might hack your Facebook, all those things, and so you don't want that, so you want control over all the information that pertains to your business from their email, Google, et cetera, right? So what this will also do, which is really advantageous for creating this company cadence and putting in all the meanings and one-on-ones, is that you would be able to create a company calendar, you could call it Body Forge Fitness, company calendar, and everyone would have access to that calendar, and that is where you can keep your cadence in there, so they see all the meanings that you have, they see where your monthly is, your weekly, all that, as well as one-on-ones, quarterly, performance, et cetera, birthdays, announcements, everything can go in that one calendar, and then you can keep yourself super organized. So I highly, highly, highly, highly suggest doing this. It is so easy, and it saves so much headache, so much legal protection, and it also will just keep you 10,000 or more organized, so do it.
